channel.title: Game Changer
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer on Dropout.tv

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "Samalamadingdong"
item.description:
Find out how the Game Changer crew tricked Sam and pulled off "Samalamadingdong."

Duration: 27:58

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, paul robalino, brennan lee mulligan, david cyr kerns, ryan creamer, justin cyrul, jessyka blanco, elaine carroll, ash kron, nico romero, kevin stiller, chloe badner, mingge lin, willa leach, behind the scenes
